message:
fix: 8 bugs across term, GUI, and window crates

- term/mod.rs: empty cell chars().next().unwrap() → unwrap_or(' ')
  in DECRQCRA checksum — prevents panic on empty terminal cells from
  remote server output

- tabbar.rs: guard number_of_tabs division with .max(1) — defensive
  against empty tab list edge case

- termwindow/mod.rs: guard terminal_size.rows/cols with .max(1)
  in pixel dimension calculation during pane resize

- termwindow/mod.rs: early return when workspaces list is empty before
  modulo operation in SwitchWorkspaceRelative

- colorease.rs: guard in_duration/out_duration float division against
  zero — prevents infinity propagation in easing calculations

- colorease.rs: clamp animation_fps to .max(1) — prevents div-by-zero
  when config animation_fps is 0

- mouseevent.rs: guard cell_size modulo operations with > 0 check —
  prevents panic if render metrics have zero-size cells

- window/macos/window.rs: clamp f64 to i16 range before cast in
  round_away_from_zero — prevents undefined behavior on extreme
  scroll wheel delta values

Validated: 254 term + 304 mux tests pass via rch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
